channel.title: Credential Revocation on Sujith Quintelier
channel.description: Recent content in Credential Revocation on Sujith Quintelier

item.title: github: Self-service credential revocation for incident response
item.description:
GitHub Enterprise owners can now use a new break-glass capability to immediately revoke all credentials for a compromised account or stolen credentials during incident response. The feature is self-service and intended for urgent security handling.

  • Source: GitHub
